CustomField.formula: IF( sugati__SB_Zero_Sell_Price_For_Tour__c, 0, IF( ISBLANK(sugati__SB_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Agent__c) , Round( sugati__SB_Marked_Up_Cost__c / $Setup.sugati__FormulaSV__c.sugati__Sell_Round_Up__c ,0)*$Setup.sugati__FormulaSV__c.sugati__Sell_Round_Up__c , IF( $Setup.sugati__Financial_Charges__c.sugati__Consider_Agent_Comm_in_Sell_Price__c, sugati__SB_Marked_Up_Cost__c - sugati__SB_Total_Commission__c - sugati__SB_Total_Agent_Commission__c, Round((sugati__SB_Marked_Up_Cost__c - sugati__SB_Total_Commission__c)/$Setup.sugati__FormulaSV__c.sugati__Sell_Round_Up__c,0)*$Setup.sugati__FormulaSV__c.sugati__Sell_Round_Up__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Sell
